Let's share
a moment
WELCOME TO DRUGSTORE

Because that's what life is all about. Sharing moments with others.
And knowing how to cherish them and make them even more
special. Here, you can do just that. For nearly 50 years now. With a menu
tailored to every time of day. So that not a single moment
is wasted. Welcome to Drugstore.

So yes, we’ve been around for a while. Spanning
two generations of our family. Recently, we’ve launched
a completely revamped concept. Our
two buildings have undergone a total
makeover. Just like the Grote Markt,
more than ever the beating heart of our
beautiful city. And our
faithful companion all these years. Drugsstore is rooted
in this place. Where everything revolves around
connection. Our summer and winter terraces are
resting spots for visitors and a little
like coming home for every Hasselaar.

Explore our establishment. Take in
the atmosphere and immediately the aroma of
our Mibrasa and pizza oven. The best
of both worlds. North and south. They
reveal what the new Drugsstore stands
for: natural aromas, unique flavors,
food sharing, and a varied and creative
selection. Without losing sight of the classics

. Visit our stylish wine fridge
and make your own selection for lunch or
dinner. Or for an aperitif by the star-filled
fireplace.

Every corner of our establishment tells a
story. Like the neon lighting that
evokes the iconic facade of
yesteryear and the elongated bar that seamlessly
connects the two
former buildings. Like one big family. Here,
your moments come into their own.
Here, you’ll feel right at home. And you’re
always welcome. From dawn until
dusk. Starting in 2023, even for the
night. Browse our menu and let yourself
be surprised. Choose your moment and make it
unforgettable.

Enjoy your meal!

The
Byloos Family

Fancy that too? In a little this and a little that.
In a glass and a bite. In a
relaxing chat after a tough
workday. In a cozy chat just
before dinner. In short: a moment when
you can share everything with the people you
care about. Even the contents of your plate.

That’s what we call aperatimel. Drugstore is
the perfect spot for after-work drinks with
colleagues or a pre-dinner get-together with family and
friends. With our southern-style tapas plates
and tasty appetizers, the conversation
really gets flowing. Just pick something and then enjoy
sharing it.

Shared joy is double joy.
Make someone happy with a Drugstore
Aperobon for a house aperitif
with sharing dishes.

“Sharing
is caring.”

White wine recommendations by Maarten Hofenk

California Roots 'Chardonnay'
Fresh, fruity
The best ingredients for a good life are simple: good food, good friends, and above all, good wine. This Chardonnay from California has a pale yellow, clear color.
On the nose, we find aromas of white stone fruit (peach, nectarine, etc.) and blossoms.
The palate is smooth, light, and elegant.
An affordable Chardonnay with plenty of charm!

Le Pas du Moine Château Gassier 'Rolle / Ugni Blanc'
Terroir-driven, mineral
A top-tier white wine from the Gassier estate, with a history spanning five generations. Château Gassier is located in the heart of the Arc Valley, east of Aix-Provence. A very delicious, fresh white wine from the Côtes de Provence. Delightful nose of lychee and mango with a subtle hint of blossoms and exotic fruit. A beautiful combination of complexity and a long finish.
A real surprise!

Winkl Cantina Tertan 'Sauvignon Blanc'
Terroir, mineral
Cantina Tertano, founded in 1893, has a long tradition of producing white wines. The high-altitude subregion of Winkl is the source of superior Sauvignon grapes. This 100% Sauvignon Blanc can easily be placed alongside the very best Sancerre and Pouilly-Fumé wines. A delicious Sauvignon Blanc with typical aromas of white fruit and passion fruit, along with a hint of lychee and citrus. Highly recommended for true Sauvignon Blanc enthusiasts!

La Rocca Pieropan 'Garganega'
Full-Bodied
The success formula of Leonildo Pieropan and his two sons, Andrea and Dario, consists of three ingredients: respect for the vineyard, passion for local culture, and the preservation of family traditions. The pure expression of Garganega can be found in the top-tier La Rocca, named after the medieval hill that towers high above Soave. This wineis the only one of the white wines to age for 12 months in large wooden barrels. La Rocca is deep, citrus-yellow, and immediately offers an expressive bouquet full of ripe fruit [pear, peach] and a hint of wood. The rich flavor is very complex, with fruit, minerality, and acidity blending perfectly.
Top Soave!

Vie di Romans 'Vie di Romans 'Chardonnay'
Full-Bodied
Azienda Agricola Vie di Romans is located in the village of Mariano del Friuli and is considered one of Friuli’s absolute top producers. Here, the grapes are harvested at the optimal moment and immediately transferred to one of the region’s finest cellars. Optimal ripeness, Giantranca Gallo’s vinification methods, and extended aging on the lees ensure that his wines rank among the absolute best in the world. The quality of the wines is internationally recognized. Light golden-yellow color. Subtle, elegant nose of honeysuckle, acacia, and hints of honeysuckle. This wine has a light, spicy character with a touch of fine oak. A great Chardonnay, just as you’d expect.

Red wine recommendations by Maarten Hofenk

Pietranera Piaggia 'Sangiovese'
Complex
The Piaggia estate is located in Poggio a Cairoo, about 14 kilometers west of Florence. Mauro Vanucci settled there in the 1970s and purchased 15 hectares of vineyards in the Carmignano appellation, where he has managed to extract the highest possible quality. The Pietranera has an intense ruby-red color. A complex nose with notes of forest fruits and soft herbs. A full-bodied and beautifully balanced palate with a good balance between tannins and acidity. Accompanied by a long finish with a pleasant freshness.

Substance 'By Charles Smith' Wines of Substance 'Cabernet Sauvignon'
A blend of Cabernet Sauvignon from Goose Ridge & Frenchman Hills in the Columbia Valley. The combination of the two terroirs gives the wine a unique signature. The Frenchman Hills vineyard is located in one of the warmest regions but remains relatively cool, partly due to its elevation of 500 meters. Rich notes of blackcurrant, cherry, as well as tobacco and morel are present. The distinct minerality is interwoven into a rich bouquet. A superb Cabernet with a sought-after bouquet—unique!

Blaufränkisch Moric 'Blaufränkisch'
Complex
While brother Hainz at the family estate Velich turns heads with his magnificent Chardonnays and sweet wines, while Roland Velich, on the other side of the Mittlmelmei in Burgentand, focuses on top-tier reds. Previously unseen and truly unique is the Moric series of wines, all single-vineyard wines based on the typical Blaufränkisch. Velich crafts his Blaufränkisch much like a winemaker in Burgundy does with his Pinot Noir. It is therefore no surprise that these great wines bear Pinot Noir characteristics. Deep red with violet hues at the rim. Aromas of rich cherry and strawberry. A knotty, juicy red cherry on the palate, balanced by leather notes. Elegant power without being heavy, and good aging potential.

Peiragal Marchesi di Barolo 'Barbera d'Alba'
Complex
They seemed to have a vision at Marchesi di Barolo when they cleared a vineyard in the heart of Barolo to plant Barbera. After all, Barolo is unique and very expensive, and as a result, the Nebbiolo-driven wines of Barolo are revered. But with this red Barbera, Marchesi di Barolo wanted to prove that the soil and terroir are unique, and that they can create a unique wine here. A warm, robust, full-bodied, and enjoyable wine. Ruby-red, with an almost purple hue. The wine’s aroma reveals notes of berries, currants, toasted hazelnut, and vanilla. The palate is round, refined, and robust, with plenty of black and red fruit, as well as light spices, vanilla, oak, licorice, and almond notes. What a fantastic wine!

Aalto 'Tinto Fino'
Complex
Aalto is one of Spain’s most sought-after wines. The magnificent winery was founded in 1999. Mariano Garcia, the man who made Vega Sicilia great back then, is deeply involved in the vision and philosophy of this prestigious winery. To this day, it is still Garcia who determines the vinification and style of the wine. In less than 15 years, the magnificent Aalto has established itself among the absolute top of Spain. The wines are characterized by elegant power and graceful aging. A complex blend of blackcurrant, toast, mocha, and earthy notes. The palate is exceptionally rich and full of dark red fruit. With its magnificent balance, this is a superbly distinguished, noble wine for the connoisseur.

# “Let’s share a moment”

## Moments of your life

Because that’s what life is all about.

Cherishing moments. And having the knack to share them with others, making them even more special. At Grand Café Drugstore, you can do just that. We’ve been doing it for nearly 50 years. With a menu tailored to every time of day. So that not a single moment is wasted. Come discover it for yourself, from Monday morning through Sunday evening.

### Welcome to Drugstore

[book your moment](https://drugstorehasselt.be/reserveren/)

![](https://drugstorehasselt.be/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/drugstore-9oktober-07.jpg)

![](https://drugstorehasselt.be/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Paasmenu-Drugstore-2026.jpeg)

![](https://drugstorehasselt.be/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/drugstore_29sep-046.jpg)

### precious evening moments

Dinner isn’t just something you do in the evening before something else. Dinner is the evening.

[book your moment](https://drugstorehasselt.be/reserveren/)

### bright morning moments

Our breakfast options have something for everyone. Surprisingly healthy or traditionally hearty, but always delicious. Welcome to a cheerful and sunny start. Sunny side up!

[book your moment](https://drugstorehasselt.be/reserveren/)

![](https://drugstorehasselt.be/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Lente-suggestie-Drugstore-2026.jpg)

**Brunch time!**

Up bright and early or a leisurely late start. The best days start with a good breakfast. We’d love to treat you to a **delicious, healthy breakfast**.

Our fresh-off-the-press breakfast menus have something for everyone. Surprisingly healthy, vegan, or traditionally hearty, but always delicious. Sunny side up! Spread some morning cheer to someone else with our Drugstore Breakfast Voucher for two or more people.

**Aperitif time!**

Drugstore is the perfect spot for after-work drinks with colleagues or a pre-dinner gathering with family and friends. With our Southern-style tapas platters, cold or warm oysters, and flavorful appetizers, the conversation really gets going. Just pick what you like and share the fun.

In short: a moment when you can share everything with the people you care about. Even the contents of your plate!

[Reserve your table](https://drugstorehasselt.be/reserveren/) [Order your gift card](https://drugstorehasselt.be/cadeaubon/)

![Coffee with latte art](https://drugstorehasselt.be/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/job-pagina-4.png)

# “A good life is a collection of happy moments”

![About Us](https://drugstorehasselt.be/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/over-ons-drugstore-markt035-1-scaled.jpg)

The Byloos family has been a fixture in Hasselt’s hospitality scene for quite some time—spanning two generations. Recently, we’ve launched a completely revamped concept. Our two locations have undergone a total transformation, just like the Grote Markt, which is now more than ever the beating heart of our beautiful city. And our faithful companion all these years. Drugstore is rooted in this place. Where everything revolves around connection. Our summer and winter terraces are places of respite for visitors and a little slice of home for every Hassel resident.

### Welcome to Drugstore

Explore our establishment. Soak up the atmosphere and the aroma of our Mibrasa and pizza oven. The best of both worlds. North and south. They reveal what the new Drugstore stands for: natural aromas, unique flavors, food sharing, and a varied and creative menu. Without losing sight of the classics. Visit our stylish wine cellar and make your own selection for lunch or dinner. Or for an aperitif by the cozy fireplace.

Every corner of our establishment tells a story. Like the neon lighting that references the iconic facade of yesteryear and the elongated bar that seamlessly connects the two buildings. Like one big family. This is where your moments shine brightest. Here, you’ll feel right at home. And you’re always welcome. From dawn until dusk. And starting in 2023, even through the night. Discover the new Drugstore and let yourself be surprised. Choose your moment and make it unforgettable.

### Enjoy

**The Drugstore Team**

# “Let’s make the most of every moment”

## Moments together are more precious

A brainstorming brunch? A group lunch after a productive meeting, or a cozy dinner together after work? In short, combining business with pleasure?

At Drugstore, you’ve come to the right place. We’d be happy to host your business dinner.

If you’re looking for something less formal and want to sit together as a group—whether you want to be loud or not—we’d be happy to host your party in our meeting room, rooftop terrace, or cozy wine cellar.

![](https://drugstorehasselt.be/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/PHOTO-2022-03-21-14-50-33.jpg)

### Nice to _meet_ you

**Meeting Room on the First Floor**

Our meeting room, with an exceptional view of the Grote Markt, can be reconfigured into various table arrangements. The large oval table is ideal for a group discussion over a hearty breakfast, lunch, or dinner. Would you rather sit in cozy small groups? No problem—we’ll rearrange our tables to meet your needs.

This meeting room has a capacity of up to 36 people

**Private rooftop terrace on the first floor**

Would you like to imagine yourself on a rooftop terrace in Madrid or Milan this summer? Then we definitely recommend a group dinner on our open-air rooftop terrace on the first floor. The atmospheric decor and the summer breeze make for a perfect balmy summer evening.

This rooftop terrace has a capacity of up to 30 people

**Authentic vaulted wine cellar**

Would you like to gather in an authentic, cozy atmosphere? Then our vaulted cellar is sure to charm you. Celebrate in a cozy and intimate setting—whether it’s a birthday party, bachelor(ette) party, or staff party. You name it, and we’ll welcome you!

This wine cellar has a capacity of up to 20 people seated and 40 people standing
